posting.applicationSummary: Pick up applications at Roofers Local Union #203 JAC in Binghamton during weekday morning hours, then return completed applications by mail or in person by January 31, 2027.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Roofers Local Union #203 JAC, 32 West State Street, 2nd Floor Suite 206, Binghamton, NY 13901
posting.applicationMailingAddress: Roofers Local Union #203 JAC, 32 West State Street, 2nd Floor Suite 206, Binghamton, NY 13901
posting.applicationHours: 9:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m., Monday through Friday, excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.classRequirement: Must be able to attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma (such as TASC or GED).

Must sign a statement indicating that they are physically able to perform the work of a Roofer, including working with sharp objects, hazardous machinery, and possible exposure to loud noises, skin and respiratory irritants; prolonged standing, walking, and kneeling; repetitive squatting and bending; working in extreme temperatures and all-weather conditions; lifting and moving heavy objects and equipment; and working from ladders and scaffolds at extreme heights.
Must have reliable means of transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must provide DD-214, Certificate of Release or Discharge from Active Duty, if applicable, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have a high school diploma or equivalency, be physically able to do roofing work, and have reliable transportation to job sites and required classes.
posting.contactSummary: For more information, contact Roofers Local Union #203 JAC at (607) 722-4073.
